title: GlossExtrema
description:
GlossExtrema

Extrema

The extrema is the coordinates of a blob's minimum enclosing rectangle. In other words, when a blob is found, if you draw a rectangle around the blob where each of the lines of the rectangle form tangents with the outermost -X, +X, -Y, and +Y pixel coordinate positions on the found blob, this rectangle forms what is called the extrema.
